name: Ground Pork Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground pork and drain it.
2. Cream together the lard, sugar, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and stir well.
4. Gradually add the flour, soda, and cinnamon to the wet ingredients, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Stir in the peanut butter, nuts, and shredded orange rind until evenly distributed throughout the dough.
6. Shape the dough into small balls (about 1 inch in diameter) and place them on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Press each ball down with a fork dipped in sugar to create an even shape.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Store the cooled cookies in an airtight container and refrigerate. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
